decision: Gate J passed for devmasterd operational validation.
summary: Reviewed repeated localhost devmasterd validation: three smoke iterations ran, unauthorized requests returned 401 every time, intake -> authorize -> run-provider -> evidence passed every time, and external side effect count was zero.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to CLI control-surface activation proposal. Keep CLI as a devmasterd client only; do not start Web Console, IDE extension, real provider calls, subscription CLI daemonization, external repo mutation, deploy, PR creation, or production side effects.
notes: Gate J validates repeated daemon use only and does not authorize new surfaces except a CLI activation proposal.
